name: Crock-Pot Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and onion in a frying pan, then drain off any excess fat.
2. Transfer the mixture to the crock-pot.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the crock-pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours.
5. Serve over hot spaghetti. This dish can also be made ahead of time and frozen for later use.
